Physical relationships: The mustard bottle rests partially on top of the cracker box and is in near-contact with the small metal can located at its top-left.
Reason: Retrieving the bottle slowly avoids dragging or disturbing the cracker box it is currently resting upon due to friction.
Best direction reason: Directions 5, 6, and 7 pull the bottle straight out into the wide open, obstacle-free space at the bottom of the table.
Worst direction reason: Direction 12 pushes the bottle directly into the adjacent metal can and cracker box, causing immediate collisions.
